summary: Multi-segment timer with callbacks for cue-based sequencing, countdowns, and timed events. Outputs normalized fraction, elapsed time, and segment info.

key_params.name: length
key_params.note: Duration of the timer segment (in seconds or frames depending on units)

key_params.name: initialize
key_params.note: Pulse to reset the timer to the beginning

key_params.name: callbacks
key_params.note: Path to a DAT containing onDone, onSegmentEnter callbacks

key_params.name: cycle
key_params.note: Loop the timer when it reaches the end

common_gotchas: The timer will not start until you pulse 'initialize' then set 'play' to 1 — both are required.
Callback DATs must define the correct function signatures or they will be silently ignored.
